title: FOREIGN KEY constraint failed
body:
### Issue Description

When creating and starting a pod with `podman kube play --replace`, I got an error about a missing foreign key.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Here is what I have:
1. a user named "podman"
2. a quadlet file that generate a systemd user unit
3. the quadlet file references a kube spec file

When my systemd booted, the `systemctl --user status nginx` command tells me that everything was ok, but looking at the output of `podman ps -a` I could see that only the pause container was up, the other one was created but not up.

When I run `podman kube play --replace <file>` manually, I observe the foreign key error.

Here is my quadlet file:
```
[Unit]
Description=A nginx instance
Before=local-fs.target

[Kube]
Yaml=/home/podman/nginx/nginx.yaml
Network=vnet-nginx

[Install]
# Start by default on boot
WantedBy=default.target
```

The kube spec file:
```
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: nginx
spec:
  restartPolicy: Never
  containers:
    - name: nginx
      image: docker.io/library/nginx:1.27.2
      securityContext:
        capabilities:
          drop:
            - CAP_MKNOD
            - CAP_NET_RAW
            - CAP_AUDIT_WRITE
      ports:
        - containerPort: 80
          hostPort: 8080
        - containerPort: 443
          hostPort: 8443
        - containerPort: 9000
          hostPort: 9000
      volumeMounts:
        - name: conf
          mountPath: /etc/nginx/conf.d:Z
        - name: tls
          mountPath: /etc/nginx/ssl:Z
        - name: www
          mountPath: /var/www:Z
  volumes:
    - name: conf
      hostPath:
        path: /home/podman/nginx/conf.d
        type: Directory
    - name: tls
      hostPath:
        path: /home/podman/nginx/tls
        type: Directory
    - name: www
      hostPath:
        path: /home/podman/nginx/www
        type: Directory
```


### Describe the results you received

```
podman@oreo:~/nginx$ podman kube play --replace nginx.yaml 
Pods stopped:
c7bb18dc6c6049d6f2601805d7f4a376c68fd665387318a533aff2449faa191c
Pods removed:
c7bb18dc6c6049d6f2601805d7f4a376c68fd665387318a533aff2449faa191c
Secrets removed:
Volumes removed:
Error: adding container config to database: FOREIGN KEY constraint failed
```

### Describe the results you expected

The pod starts.

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

Rootless

### Upstream Latest Release

No

### Additional environment details

This is running in a VM with Ubuntu Server 24.04 up to date.

### Additional information

It seems that my `/tmp` folder is not cleaned on boot, maybe it is related.

comments.body: We only supported the latest version upstream. Please test this with podman v5.4.

A reviewer has determined we need more information to understand the reported issue.  A comment on what is missing should be provided. Be certain you:

* provide an exact reproducer where possible
* verify you have provided all relevant information - minimum is `podman info`
* answer any follow up questions

If no response to the `needs-info` is provided in 30 days, this issue may be closed by our stale bot.

For more information on reporting issues on this repository, consult our [issue guide](ISSUE.md).
